title: gh-122273: Support PyREPL history in Windows
author: devdanzin
body:
This PR aims to add support for recording and loading command history in Windows, using `_pyrepl.readline` to support handling the history file.

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-122273 -->
* Issue: gh-122273
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: JeffersGlass
comments.body:
Gave this a try, and it does appear to work as expected, at least on a stock Windows 10 build:

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2f0d9f9-d778-46fe-9f4d-929bea006bcb)

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: @devdanzin: There is now a merge conflict after my latest site change. Would you mind to update your PR?

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: I'm not fully satisfied by proposed change, so I proposed a PR based somehow on this one: PR gh-127141.

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body: Closing in favor of PR https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/127141, which does it better.
